pr.title: Record (pending): 92-experiment autoresearch + sliding window eval, pre-quant val_bpb=1.2156

output.summary: Autoresearch-tuned 9L/512d model uses sliding-window RoPE eval and relu²+RMSNorm with Muon/AdamW to keep int8 quantization clean on 8xH100.
output.valOnlyReasoning: TRAIN_ON_VAL=1 purposely incorporates the validation shard into training.
techniques: Autoresearch loop to find the winning config
Sliding-window eval with stride 64 and RoPE extrapolation
relu²+RMSNorm combination for clean int8 quantization
